title: Legacy Keys
description: A simple mod which improves the Keybinds menu in legacy Minecraft
body: # Loop Keys ![Available for Ornithe](https://github.com/TheLoopProject/loop-badges/blob/main/badges/64x/ornithe/Available%20for%20Ornithe_64h.png?raw=true) ![Requires Ornithe's Standard Libraries](https://github.com/TheLoopProject/loop-badges/blob/main/badges/64x/ornithe/Requires%20OSL%20(Short)_64h.png?raw=true) ![Supports fabric](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy/supported/fabric_64h.png?raw=true) ![Works On Quilt](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy/supported/quilt_64h.png?raw=true) ![Won't Support Forge](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy/unsupported/forge_64h.png?raw=true) ![Won't Support LiteLoader](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy/unsupported/liteloader_64h.png?raw=true) ![Won't Support Risugami's Modloader](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy/unsupported/risugamis-modloader_64h.png?raw=true) This is a mod that improves the keybind selection screen in older versions of Minecraft. ![The Minecraft controls menu.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Xz3LQv8V/images/524307e8bc6e6d26de3abe30ed911402f6bcf479.png) ###### *^ the player has [Sprint](https://modrinth.com/project/sprint) installed* ## 🏳️‍🌈-Pridecraft Have you ever thought that your game is too boring and straight? Well, that's no more! Get [Pridepack](https://pridecraft.gay/pridepack) *(or [it's variations](https://git.pridecraft.gay))* today!
